title: Video Not playing in multiple streaming sites
content:
When on Amazon Prime web player, I get "Video Unavailable

We're experiencing a problem playing this video. For assistance, please go to ...videohelp." no error code When on Crunchyroll, I get "Oops. something went wrong. Try again" and error code: SHAK 6007

I am on the last public update to Windows 10 Home. I have checked that DRM is on. I have restarted Firefox, and used troubleshooting mode to verify it isn't an add-on issue. Hardware acceleration is off. Cache has been cleaned, and I have even refreshed firefox. Router and PC have been restarted. Graphic drivers have been updated. Also, videos play in Brave.

After the latest update I was met with a blank profile, no saved data, even when syncing with my Mozilla Account. I followed the back-up instructions by the support team described in the forums, but it wasn't enough. Common sites I frequent like youtube and gmail were not indexed, the passwords and logins were nowhere to be found. I really don't get what's going on, or why would the Mozilla Account wouldn't recover the data, while leaving that to profiles. Is there any way to recover it further? Or even disable profiles?

Thanks in Advance,

title: What's wrong with things that Firefox, Youtube, and Windows 10 aren't really working together anymore?
content:
I used to be able to have all sorts of tabs open for an entire month. Now, I can't keep them open even for a day. It seems to be a problem selective to Youtube (other tabs like Yahoo Mail still work), leaving my Alienware 15R4 laptop fans running really loudly for a few days now, since updates ran (not sure if that's related), and leaving me having to shut down and reboot the browser, daily, instead of once or twice a month. Is there anyone working on getting us back the old Youtube, or replacing Youtube with something like what it used to be? I am running adblock plus and uBlock Origin, should probably turn them off to see if they're related to the problem, huh? I'd hate to start having to use a different browser.

Windows 10 Home V 22H2 Alienware 15R4 Firefox 147.0.3

title: WHAT IS FLASH BITCOIN
content:
In today’s fast-moving crypto world, new tools are created to help people trade faster and easier. One of these tools is our Flash USDT Simulator, built to show how quick digital transactions can work. This page explains what the simulator does, how to get access, and the software behind it.

https://telegram.me/fastflashcoin

WhatsApp: https://wa.me/+447462625990

What Is Flash USDT (Simulator)?

Flash USDT is a demo tool that lets users test fast, sample USDT-style transactions. It’s made for people who want to learn how quick transfers work without waiting for long blockchain processing times.

Our Flash USDT software helps users run high-speed test transactions and understand how digital assets move across networks. The software package costs $1,500 and supports up to $25,000 in daily simulated transfers for training and demonstration purposes

How to Access the Flash USDT Package

We offer a $200 learning package that lets you test up to $2,000 in simulated USDT transfers. More details are available on our website.

Contact Information

title: Immigrating data from profile to new account
content: I have a profile that I had copied from my main profile, which is connected to an email and synced. This second profile is unsynced, and it won't let me sign into my account because that account is connected to the main profile. It says I need a separate account for a separate profile. Fair enough. I try to make an account. It says I cannot sign in to the new account because the profile is synced to the old one. Very annoying to be given instructions that don't work. So, I make a new profile and sign in to my new account on it. It works. But now I don't have my bookmarks and passwords. So I find instructions on backing up my account and copy my secondary profile into the new profile with the new account. It logs me out and is now giving me the same error! (the backup was successful though) I don't want to have to copy and paste all of my passwords and things into a new account. Is there any way to make my secondary profile syncable?

title: Audio and Video out of sync in some videos
content: Some videos work perfectly fine, however for some videos audio lags behind the video. The same video file perfectly works in Chromium as a control test. Example file is MP4, inside was initially h264 video with AAC audio, for test I re-encoded video to be svt-AV1 with AAC / flac as well - no difference, audio still lags behind. Local players (mpv) and Chromium works perfectly. No plugins which can affect it - for testing disabled them all. I really try hard to like Firefox but this thing is a real bummer. Any ideas what can be causing? P.S. I tested both firefox compiled from source and binary package provided by my distro. Linux system if that matters.
creator: eugene9
